settings.label: Heading
settings.default: A quiet luxury, carved into the cliffs

settings.label: Body
settings.default:
Aegean Resort is a collection of suites and villas terraced into the volcanic rock of Oia. Each room opens to the caldera, where whitewashed walls catch the morning light and the sea stretches endlessly toward the horizon.

Ours is a slow kind of luxury — long breakfasts, warm stone underfoot, and the hush of the Cyclades at dusk.
